title: road rage + no mad (2)

        - your dog's shitting in my yard
and it isn't that hard
for either one of us to pick it up but my god
we already got the guns
so why not go to war
if this isn't time to fuck did we buy em for
extra ammo is a luxury that i can't afford
shoot first ask later that's why we keep score
settle who's better on board then embed it in stone
they don't give trophies to losers i refuse to never be known
i need all you other assholes to see where i'm going
get the fuck out the way so i'm a sit on my horn

        - you remember places. i prefer routes
you know where we put it. i put it in play
how else can i  put it? what code can compute
capital is common you can't claim without dispute
i know what i own
keys wallet phone
that's car, gas, and maps
to get me where i'm going
and i can see the traffic
i know i'm not alone
can't ever go back so we buy mobile homes
toad get bumpy we feel it in our bones
i'm a driver i've accustomed to the road
flyin by my seat and living out the trunk
rapping the wheel as i swerve to the funk
